records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Relied (-l?d"); p. pr. & vb. n. Relying.]

defs: To rest with confidence, as when fully satisfied of the veracity, integrity, or ability of persons, or of the certainty of facts or of evidence; to have confidence; to trust; to depend; -- with on, formerly also with in.
quotes: Go in thy native innocence; rely On what thou hast of virtue.
On some fond breast the parting soul relies.
